results.description:
Can he save her from a killer

when nobody believes her?

Stunned to see a murder being committed right in front of her, Amy Sue Brand is even more shocked when she recognizes the killer. But with the victim vanished and the perp's airtight alibi, no one believes her. Homicide detective Russell Tate thinks Amy could be telling the truth. He vows to keep her alive and bring the culprit to justice. The closer Russell and Amy get to the truth—and to each other—the more Amy risks becoming a multiple murderer’s next victim…

From Harlequin Intrigue: Seek thrills. Solve crimes. Justice served.

Discover more action-packed stories in the Dry Gulch, Montana series. All books are stand-alone with uplifting endings but were published in the following order:

 Book 1: Reckoning with the Cowboy
Book 2: Targeting the Sheriff
Book 3: Lawman's Witness
